steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage provides examples of state soil designations from different years (1983, 1985), indicating that years pass between selection and official designation.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”In many cases,” correctly indicates that delays between selection and designation are frequent, not exceptional. The other choices fail because “Therefore” falsely treats the examples as logical premises, “Indeed” confirms something not yet stated, and “Similarly” creates a nonexistent comparison. That matches choice A — A is correct.
